title: plagiobothrys collinus
intro: Plagiobothrys collinus, also known as small-flowered popcorn flower, is a small annual plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to western North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Plagiobothrys collinus include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, or by using a tincture made from the plant's roots and leaves.
